response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep systems knowledge, and demonstrated contributions to AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of leading multi-agent AI systems at scale in regulated fintech environments, managing teams beyond 10 people, or designing financial risk/credit systems — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, event-driven architecture, and real-time data handling
Strong engineering culture advocacy through testing, CI/CD, and open-source tooling contributions
concerns: No explicit evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
Lacks demonstrated production experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk, or regulated financial systems
No clear record of designing model-agnostic agentic architectures with feedback loops for financial decisioning
